"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\testall.dir/objects.a
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\testall.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\testall.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\c++.exe  -O2 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\testall.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o testall.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libtestall.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\testall.dir\linkLibs.rsp
